name: Samantha Li

cv_text: Samantha Li. Year 1 BA Comparative Literature, HKU. Non-local student from Guangdong, Mainland China. Gaokao top 5% in Guangdong Province. Volunteer translator at HKU International Student Services. Creative writing contributor to student literary journal. Active participant in cultural exchange activities. Fluent in Mandarin and English, conversational Cantonese. Interests in GBA cultural programmes, community service, and cross-cultural literary studies.
